description.value: Aura moderate necromancy; CL 9th; Weight 10 lbs.; Price 12,405 gp DESCRIPTION This silk +1 shadow padded armor is as dark as night and stitched with thread the color of dried blood. When worn by a rogue with the bleed talent, it increases the bleed damage of the rogue’s sneak attacks by +1. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells bleed, invisibility, silence; Cost 6,280 gp
